name: Orica Limited
analysis: ORI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$22.8497. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$23.0088 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$22.8497, stop A$22.0572, target A$23.3000. Risk/reward is 0.57:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
